nasb.text: If you have nothing with which to pay, Why should he take your bed from under you?

esv.text: If you have nothing with which to pay, why should your bed be taken from under you?

cnv.text: 如果你沒有甚麼可以償還， 何必使人連你睡覺的床也奪去呢？

ccb.text: 如果你还不起， 连你的床也会被抬走。

csbs.text: 如果你无力偿还， 你身下的床就要被人拿走， 何必如此呢？
